top_signals.title: Asian Stocks to Fall, Oil Rises as US Strikes Iran: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks were poised for losses on Thursday as a tech-led selloff on Wall Street and rising oil prices fueled by renewed Middle East tensions weighed on sentiment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US launches fresh wave of strikes on Iran
top_signals.summary: Second day of attacks put fragile ceasefire under new strain, pushing up oil prices
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: TDK to buy US maker of AI data center cooling components for up to $400m
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Royal Caribbean Welcomes Legend of the Seas
top_signals.summary: Royal Caribbean has officially welcomed Legend of the Seas. After nearly two years of construction at the Meyer Turku shipyard in Turku, Finland, the third Icon Class ship is now ready to make its July 2026 European debut.To mark the milestone…
